name: Quadratic Equation Calculator
desc: Quadratic Equation Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
description: Solve quadratic equations ax2 + bx + c = 0.
seo_title: Quadratic Equation Calculator – Free Online Tool
seo_description: Use our free quadratic equation calculator to quickly estimate x1, x2 based on a, b, c. Not registration needed.

range_hints.a: Must be non-zero (otherwise not quadratic); typical: -100 to 100

result_context: The solutions x1 ({x1}) and x2 ({x2}) are the roots where the parabola cross is the x-axis; discriminante ({discriminante}) determin is solution type (positive=2 current, zero=1 current, negative=complex).
mistakes: Not checking if a=0 (would make it linear, not quadratic)
Forgetting the ± giv is two solutions, not just one
Misapplying signs when b is negative in the formula
